Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Orange Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Orange Light can be used to move objects on a cushion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Orange Light is a power Alin uses to levitate locks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can levitate on a wave of Orange Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Orange Light can create a bubble that lifts and snares.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Orange Light failed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Simon is wrapped in Orange Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Orange Light is a voice that reminds Alin of his friends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Orange Light told Alin he proved himself an enemy to those who should be his friends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Orange Light told Alin they need him to even the odds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin can catch himself with Orange Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin flew on wings of Orange Light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
